rows.name: adr-required
rows.description: Architecture-significant changes MUST be accompanied by an accepted ADR artifact linked to the change. The policy blocks promotion when no ADR is present.

rows.name: tests-required
rows.description: Pull requests MUST have a green test run before they can be merged. Coverage delta MUST be at or above the project baseline.

rows.name: security-scan-required
rows.description: Security scanning MUST pass before any deployment to a non-development environment. Critical and high findings MUST be remediated or explicitly waived by the security steward.

rows.name: peer-review-required
rows.description: Every pull request MUST be approved by at least one peer reviewer who is not the author before it can be merged.
